notes: The native Linux version isn't working for several years now, but the Windows version used to work. Under Proton 9, I can start the game, see the hangar and do some basic actions. When I try to enter a battle or preview certain ships, the game crashes. Also framerate is extremely poor (like 10-15FPS). Under GE-Proton8-32 the game works much smoother and you can actually do the battles and Open Space and so on.
title: Star Conflict

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 580 (radeonsi, polaris10, ACO, DRM 3.61, 6.14.0-27-generic)
title: Star Conflict
